response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems expertise (e.g., high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby, event-driven platforms like GISCollective) and leadership in scaling engineering teams (e.g., Altom Consulting, re:cinq). However, his resume lacks direct experience with agentic-AI systems, fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, real-time algorithms), or regulated environments—critical for the CTO role. His recent AI-agent contributions (MCP, agentic workflows) are promising but not at the scale or depth required.
strengths: Proven expertise in distributed systems and high-performance backend development (Dlang, Node.js, microservices)
Strong engineering leadership and team scaling experience (Altom Consulting, re:cinq)
Open-source contributions and technical depth in event-driven architectures (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with agentic-AI systems in production or fintech-specific applications
Limited exposure to regulated environments or financial compliance requirements
Recent AI-agent work appears research/prototyping-oriented rather than commercial, large-scale deployment
